summary: Iteration 20: AgentHomePage.js decomposition testing complete. All 10 features PASSED. The decomposition from 2,436 lines to 229 lines (thin orchestrator) with 5 extracted components (ControlTower, CommandBar, ActionPreviewDrawer, WorkflowDialog, RecentActivity) plus utils.js is working correctly with no regressions.
critical_code_review_comments: AgentHomePage.js correctly imports all 5 decomposed components from /components/dashboard/
ControlTower.js (177 lines) - self-contained with ActionCard and KpiItem sub-components, fetches stats independently
CommandBar.js (428 lines) - forwardRef with imperative handle for focus/clear, handles text/voice/file input correctly
ActionPreviewDrawer.js (510 lines) - Sheet with internal sub-components for extraction results display
WorkflowDialog.js (397 lines) - Dialog with context form, execution, retry functionality
RecentActivity.js (78 lines) - pure presentational with dedup filter
utils.js (61 lines) - shared API, auth headers, intent labels, formatting helpers
AgentLayout import correctly uses named export { AgentLayout }
All data-testid attributes preserved for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: AgentHomePage decomposition complete and verified. All 5 extracted components work correctly. Dashboard renders Control Tower (Action Cards + KPI Strip), Command Bar (text/voice/file input), Context Selector (project/client/unit dropdowns), and Recent Activity. Navigation to Feed, Billing, Settings pages works. Settings tabs (Account, Preferences, Team, Billing) all functional.

dashboard_control_tower.details: Control Tower renders with Action Cards (2 Change Requests, 2 Pending Invoices, 6 Pending Quotes) and KPI strip (5 Total Clients, 1 Active Projects, 32'400 Revenue CHF, 2 Approved Quotes)

command_bar.details: Command Bar renders with text input, voice button, file upload button, and submit button

context_selector.details: Project and Client dropdowns open and function correctly

recent_activity.details: 4 deduplicated recent activity items displayed with navigation working

action_card_navigation_invoices.details: Clicking Pending Invoices card navigates to /agent/invoices

action_card_navigation_quotes.details: Clicking Pending Quotes card navigates to /agent/quotes

refresh_button.details: Refresh button reloads stats and recent activity

feed_page.details: Feed page loads correctly with 9 activities

billing_page.details: Billing page loads with subscription plans (Free, Starter, Pro, Enterprise)

settings_page_tabs.details: Settings page loads with all 4 tabs (Account, Preferences, Team, Billing) working correctly
